description_long: This is a bright yellow, foldable caution sign commonly used to warn pedestrians of wet floors. The sign features a large, bold black triangle with a pictogram of a person slipping, accompanied by the words 'CAUTION WET FLOOR' in uppercase black and red letters. The sign is constructed from lightweight plastic and has a built-in handle at the top for easy carrying and placement. Its A-frame design allows it to stand securely on flat surfaces, with two wide legs providing stability. The surface is smooth and slightly glossy, making the warning highly visible even from a distance. Red dots at the bottom of the sign add extra visual emphasis to the warning message.
description: A bright yellow, foldable plastic caution sign with a 'CAUTION WET FLOOR' warning and a slipping person pictogram. It features an A-frame design with a handle for portability.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full warning message, pictogram, and handle at the top.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the thin A-frame profile and the open, foldable structure.
description_view_2: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, with the same warning message and handle visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the thin A-frame profile and open structure.
